purpose: Public Pressure Mines Phase 13 data surface. Generated from Phase 10 operating-envelope receipts and Phase 12 same-field Bayesian pressure-floor receipts; do not hand-edit.
claimBoundary: Pressure Mines remains an Operating-Envelope Study. The Bayesian comparator here is a pressure-floor parity receipt versus naive_pressure and sundog_minimal, not a claim that the current posterior policy dominates sundog_lean or clears the board.

pressureFloorGate.label: Pressure-floor parity
pressureFloorGate.note: Pass means the pressure-budget Bayes lane is never worse than the pressure-ordering floor on mean budget-adjusted safe tiles. It does not mean Bayes dominates sundog_lean.

claimCards.label: Phase 10 operating envelope
claimCards.scope: A narrow confirmed density/noise/dropout pocket is published beside its matched failure region.

claimCards.label: Phase 12 Bayesian pressure floor
claimCards.scope: Same-field pressure-budget Bayes matches naive_pressure and sundog_minimal floors across the Phase 10 cell slate; sundog_lean remains a separate stronger comparator in the promoted candidate.

traceSamplePolicy.candidates: first 10 candidates from each stored posterior map entry
first 10 candidates from each stored posterior map entry

posteriorCells.label: Bayes-divergence cell
posteriorCells.reason: Largest absolute mean delta between bayes_frontier_pressure and sundog_lean in the Phase 10-slate reducer.

traceSamplePolicy.candidates: first 10 candidates from each stored posterior map entry
